title: Simple Sampling of Attributes Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of performing statistical inference on a population by sampling a specific binary attribute.
elements: Statistical Inference (e.g., CI for true proportion p)
relationships: Define a target population and a binary attribute
Draw a simple random sample from the population
Calculate the sample proportion (p̂) for the attribute
Use p̂ to make an inference (e.g., confidence interval) about the true population proportion (p)
